name: git-viewer
description: Read-only Git observability — status, diff, log, branches, and a per-session baseline that highlights only what changed during the current Claude session. Commits and pushes happen through the Claude session workflow, not here.

configSchema.label: Allowed Directories
configSchema.description: Comma-separated root directories. Git operations can only observe inside these roots.

configSchema.label: Default Repository
configSchema.description: Repository path opened when the panel first loads.

configSchema.label: Git Binary
configSchema.description: Path to the git executable. Leave as 'git' to use PATH.

configSchema.label: Log Entries
configSchema.description: Maximum commits returned by the log endpoint.

configSchema.label: Diff Context Lines
configSchema.description: Number of context lines around each hunk in the unified diff.

configSchema.label: Command Timeout (seconds)
configSchema.description: Hard kill any git subprocess that runs longer than this.
